task_completion.description: Log into OpenClinica and access the Phase II Diabetes Trial (DM-TRIAL-2024).
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshot shows the OpenClinica dashboard or Subject Matrix with the active study clearly indicated as 'DM-TRIAL-2024'.

task_completion.description: Locate Subject DM-101 and their 'Week 4 Follow-up' event.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshot shows the Subject Matrix or View Subject page for 'DM-101', with the 'Week 4 Follow-up' event column or row visible.

task_completion.description: Mark DM-101's 'Week 4 Follow-up' as Skipped/Stopped and add the COVID-19 discrepancy note.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshot shows the event status being changed to 'Skipped' or 'Stopped' AND a discrepancy note form/popup with Type 'Annotation' containing text about 'COVID-19'.

task_completion.description: Locate Subject DM-102 and their 'Baseline Assessment' event.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshot shows the Subject Matrix or View Subject page for 'DM-102', with the 'Baseline Assessment' event column or row visible.

task_completion.description: Mark DM-102's 'Baseline Assessment' as Skipped/Stopped and add the transportation discrepancy note.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshot shows the event status being changed to 'Skipped' or 'Stopped' AND a discrepancy note form/popup with Type 'Annotation' containing text about 'transportation'.

task_completion.description: Locate Subject DM-103 and their 'Week 4 Follow-up' event.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshot shows the Subject Matrix or View Subject page for 'DM-103', with the 'Week 4 Follow-up' event column or row visible.

task_completion.description: Mark DM-103's 'Week 4 Follow-up' as Skipped/Stopped and add the withdrew consent discrepancy note.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshot shows the event status being changed to 'Skipped' or 'Stopped' AND a discrepancy note form/popup with Type 'Annotation' containing text about 'withdrew consent'.

integrity.description: The agent used a web browser to interact with the OpenClinica GUI.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a standard web browser interface (e.g., Firefox, Chrome) navigating the OpenClinica web application, not a terminal executing SQL commands or scripts.

integrity.description: The agent entered the discrepancy notes into the actual OpenClinica application forms.
integrity.visual_evidence: The text for the notes ('COVID-19', 'transportation', 'withdrew consent') is typed into the specific OpenClinica 'Add Discrepancy Note' popup windows or text areas, rather than a separate text editor.

integrity.description: The agent used the OpenClinica UI to change the event statuses.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with OpenClinica's specific dropdowns, buttons, or action icons (like 'Skip' or 'Remove') to change the event status, rather than inspecting/editing HTML.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Study Identifier: DM-TRIAL-2024. Target Subjects: DM-101, DM-102, DM-103. Valid Event Statuses for completion: 'Stopped' or 'Skipped'. Required keywords in discrepancy notes: 'covid' (for DM-101), 'transportation' (for DM-102), and 'withdrew' (for DM-103). The notes must be of type 'Annotation'.
